base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of towers_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Towers (Mirage/Citadel of Trials) — spiral-stair walls (208×128). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
